mapper.sql: question_id, subject_id, question_no, question_text, question_type, explanation, difficulty_code, is_active, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM level_test_questions ORDER BY subject_id ASC, question_no ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO level_test_questions (subject_id, question_no, question_text, question_type, explanation, difficulty_code, is_active) VALUES (#{subjectId}, #{questionNo}, #{questionText}, #{questionType}, #{explanation}, #{difficultyCode}, #{isActive})
mapper.update: UPDATE level_test_questions SET subject_id = #{subjectId}, question_no = #{questionNo}, question_text = #{questionText}, question_type = #{questionType}, explanation = #{explanation}, difficulty_code = #{difficultyCode}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE question_id = #{questionId}
